qualification.education_qualification: Advocate enrolled with Bar Council, Minimum 7 years practice for Public Prosecutor/Additional Public Prosecutor/Government Pleader, Minimum 10 years practice for Special Public Prosecutor
qualification.details: Public Prosecutor: Advocate with not less than 7 years of practice. Government Pleader: Advocate with not less than 7 years of standing at the Bar of the Madras High Court. Additional Public Prosecutor: Advocate with not less than 7 years of practice. Special Public Prosecutor: Advocate with not less than 10 years of practice. Additional Public Prosecutor cum Additional Government Pleader: Advocate with not less than 7 years of practice. Special Public Prosecutor (SC/ST Act Cases): Advocate with not less than 10 years of practice. Special Public Prosecutor (Human Right Cases): Advocate with not less than 10 years of practice.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District Collector Krishnagiri Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: krishnagiri.nic.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the District Collector Krishnagiri Law Officers posts?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the District Collector Krishnagiri Law Officers posts is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Law Officers in Krishnagiri District?
faq.answer: There are a total of 11 vacancies for Law Officers, including various positions like Public Prosecutors, Government Pleaders, and Special Public Prosecutors, in the District Collector Krishnagiri Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum practice experience required for Public Prosecutor posts?
faq.answer: For the Public Prosecutor post, candidates must be an Advocate enrolled with the Bar Council and possess a minimum of 7 years of practice experience.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for these posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the District Collector Krishnagiri Law Officers recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the District Collector Krishnagiri Law Officers recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the form, fill it, and send it via post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for these Law Officer positions?
faq.answer: The Law Officer positions in the District Collector Krishnagiri recruitment are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q7. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the District Collector Krishnagiri.

faq.question: Q8. What is the minimum practice experience required for Special Public Prosecutor posts?
faq.answer: For Special Public Prosecutor posts, candidates must have a minimum of 10 years of practice experience as an Advocate.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this District Collector Krishnagiri Law Officers recruitment is Rc.No.12482/2026-C1.
